title: A Very 1999 Christmas Music Discs
description: Adds jschlatt's Christmas album "A Very 1999 Christmas (Deluxe)" to the game.
body:
This is a datapack/mod that adds the 11 tracks of jschlatt's A Very 1999 Christmas (Deluxe) to the game as music discs. You can acquire the album using the command or the recipe. Requires the resource pack if you are installing the datapack.

Use `/function jschlattchristmas:give` to give yourself the album with cheats.

The recipe requires 8 disc fragments, and 1 end crystal.

![An image of the crafting recipe. Shows a crafting table with 8 disc fragments arranged around an end crystal in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xDj6EAle/images/d9b3a28b46e0f1211b056fcdb0761e9574aba06a.png)

The 11 discs added are as follows:

- Santa Claus Is Coming To Town
- The Christmas Song
- Let It Snow! Let It Snow! Let It Snow!
- Happy Holiday
- Baby It’s Cold Outside
- White Christmas
- It’s The Most Wonderful Time Of The Year
- Have Yourself A Merry Little Christmas
- Sleigh Ride
- Mele Kalikimaka
- (Everybody's Waitin' For) The Man With The Bag

[The Youtube link to the album.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0l_GFQvISEM)
